title: Pale Hollow
description: An underground biome based on what people theorized the Pale Garden to be.
body:
Pale Hollow adds a new biome based on what some people theorized the Pale Garden might be, before it was revealed at Minecraft Live.

This mod also adds a new wood type, some flowers, and a high energy fuel source. These are all found in the Pale Hollow biome.

It is recommended to use this mod with the Winter Drop experiment enabled to avoid disabled blocks generating.

Bug reports and suggestions welcome and needed.
